𝗣𝗢𝗗𝗥𝗢𝗜𝗗 | Running Linux containers and command-line tools on an Android phone without requiring root privileges.  🔥 Super Hot!

•••••••••••••••••••••••

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🤖 Kotlin 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Running Linux containers and command-line tools on an Android phone without requiring root privileges.
📅 Created: Mar 2026 • Updated: Apr 2026

•••••••••••••••••••••••

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Rootless Podman container runtime on Android
✅ Lightweight QEMU VM with Alpine Linux
✅ Full VT100/xterm terminal with real PTY
✅ Extensive customization for themes, fonts, and extra keys
✅ Persistent storage and Android Downloads sharing
✅ Port forwarding and runtime network control
✅ Built-in SSH server
✅ ARM64-native performance


•••••••••••••••••••••••

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 939 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 48 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 4 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

•••••••••••••••••••••••

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Podroid enables users to run Linux containers on their Android devices without root access. It achieves this by setting up a lightweight QEMU virtual machine that hosts a Podman container runtime, providing a full terminal experience with extensive customization options for themes, fonts, and key mappings.

•••••••••••••••••••••••

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/ExTV/Podroid

𝗔𝗜-𝗦𝗨𝗕𝗧𝗜𝗧𝗟𝗘𝗦 | Automatically generating and styling subtitles for video content.  📈 Growing!

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Automatically generating and styling subtitles for video content.
📅 Created: Feb 2026 • Updated: Apr 2026

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ AI-powered subtitle generation
✅ Supports video uploads and direct media links
✅ Uses Together AI's Whisper Large v3 for transcription
✅ Real-time subtitle preview and styling with 6 preset styles
✅ Export subtitles in .srt, .vtt, or burned-in .mp4 formats
✅ Local development environment setup
✅ One-click deployment via Vercel


⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 350 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 55 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 1 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

SubStudio is a web application built with Next.js that generates subtitles for videos using AI. It leverages Together AI's Whisper model for accurate transcription and allows users to edit, style, and export subtitles in various formats.

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/Nutlope/ai-subtitles

📅 Created: Apr 2026 • Updated: Apr 2026

✅ All-in-one conversion (documents, images, audio, video)
✅ 100% Offline & Private
✅ Polished UI with Dark/Light mode and animations
✅ Statistics Dashboard with Matplotlib charts and export options
✅ Batch conversions
✅ System-aware theme switching
✅ Gamified achievements
✅ Multi-language support

File Converter Pro is a free, offline, all-in-one file conversion desktop application for Windows. It supports documents, images, audio, and video, offering a polished user interface with features like dark/light themes and a statistics dashboard, all built with Python and PySide6.

Dashy is a self-hostable personal dashboard designed to organize and provide quick access to all your self-hosted services and applications. It offers features like status monitoring, customizable widgets, theming, and a user-friendly UI editor, making it an ideal central hub for managing your homelab or personal projects.

𝗦𝗘𝗔𝗟𝗘𝗗-𝗦𝗘𝗖𝗥𝗘𝗧𝗦 | Securely managing Kubernetes Secrets in Git repositories as part of a GitOps workflow.  🔥 Super Hot!

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐹 Go 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Securely managing Kubernetes Secrets in Git repositories as part of a GitOps workflow.
📅 Created: May 2017 • Updated: Apr 2026

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ One-way encryption of Kubernetes Secrets
✅ Controller for decryption within the cluster
✅ Safe storage of secrets in Git repositories
✅ Kubeseal CLI tool for encryption and management
✅ Support for secret rotation and key management


▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 9K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 767 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 68 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Sealed Secrets is a Kubernetes controller and tool that allows for the one-way encryption of sensitive data (Secrets) before they are stored in Git. It ensures that only the controller running within the target Kubernetes cluster can decrypt these secrets, making them safe for version control.

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

The Gutenberg project is the development hub for the block editor of WordPress, revolutionizing content creation with a modular, block-based approach. It enables users to visually arrange content elements like paragraphs and images, moving beyond traditional text editing to a more intuitive and flexible publishing experience.
